zh.Of, Ashton, Devonshire, England: 英國英格蘭戴文希黑 艾希頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Chudleigh於大約1477年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Sir James Chudleigh35歲，母親Margaret Stourton24歲。他於大約1500年與Joan Hody結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1515年在他的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文。

zh-hans.Of, Ashton, Devonshire, England: 英国英格兰戴文希黑 艾希頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Chudleigh于大约1477年出生在英国戴文时，他的父亲Sir James Chudleigh35岁，母亲Margaret Stourton24岁。他于大约1500年与Joan Hody结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1515年在他的家乡享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文。

nameMeanings.name: Chudleigh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chudley
meanings: English: locative name from Chudleigh in Devon.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Chudleigh was born about 1477, in Devon, England, his father, Sir James Chudleigh, was 35 and his mother, Margaret Stourton, was 24. He married Joan Hody about 1500. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died in 1515, in his hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Chudleigh est né environ 1477, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Sir James Chudleigh, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stourton, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Joan Hody environ 1500. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1515, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Of, Ashton, Devonshire, England: Higher Ashton, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Chudleigh um 1477 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir James Chudleigh 35 und seine Mutter Margaret Stourton 24. Er hat um 1500 Joan Hody geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1515 im Alter von 39 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Joan Hody circa 1500. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1515, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Of, Ashton, Devonshire, England: イギリスイギリスデボンヒグハー アシュトン
ja.Clyst Parish Church, Devon, England: イギリスイギリスデボン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Chudleighが約1477年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Sir James Chudleighは35歳，母Margaret Stourtonは24歳であった。約1500年にJoan Hodyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1515年に故郷で39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Chudleigh(이)가 대략 1477년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir James Chudleigh(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Stourton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 대략 1500년 Joan Hody(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1515년 그의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Joan Hody aproximadamente 1500. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1515, em sua cidade natal, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Chudleigh родился около 1477 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir James Chudleigh было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stourton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Hody около 1500 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1515 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания.
